nasb.text: O Hope of Israel, Its Savior in time of distress, Why are You like a stranger in the land Or like a traveler who has pitched his tent for the night?

esv.text: O you hope of Israel, its savior in time of trouble, why should you be like a stranger in the land, like a traveler who turns aside to tarry for a night?

cnv.text: 以色列的盼望啊！ 以色列遭難時的拯救者啊！ 你為甚麼在本地像一個寄居的人， 又像個只住宿一夜的旅客呢？

ccb.text: 以色列的盼望和患难时的救主啊， 你为什么在这里像一个异乡人， 像一个只住一夜的旅客呢？
